criteria.name: Clarity of Project Finality
criteria.description: Is the deep reason why the project was created clear and documented?

criteria.name: Mission-Finality Alignment
criteria.description: Does the operational mission reflect and serve the stated finality?

criteria.name: User Audience Identification
criteria.description: Are primary and secondary users clearly identified with compatible needs?

criteria.name: Value Proposition Strength
criteria.description: Is the unique value defensible against alternatives?

criteria.name: Explicit Values & Principles
criteria.description: Are guiding principles clear and explicitly stated, not just implicit?

criteria.name: Long-Term Vision Documentation
criteria.description: Is a 3-5 year vision documented and shared across team and stakeholders?
